raw.subject: Your Laramie page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I love the ranch photos you share from around Laramie. The Wyoming landscape really shines in them.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might make it harder for pet owners to find and book your services online.

I sketched a simple page idea from what you post on Facebook. It includes a section for your various grooming services and a photo gallery showcasing some of the beautiful animals you work with. I also added a clear call-to-action for booking appointments.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/fluffy-puppy-dog-cat-grooming-laramie

If you're interested in making your online presence more straightforward, I'd be happy to discuss a simple flat fee for local businesses. Please reply or let's have a quick call to explore further.
